basic_details.job_title: JNU Part Time Pathologist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Jawaharlal Nehru University (JNU) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Part Time Pathologist Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduation Degree (MD/DNB/Diploma or equivalent in Concerned stream), Registered with Delhi Medical Council, Minimum of one year experience
qualification.details: Post Graduation Degree (MD/DNB/Diploma or equivalent in Concerned stream). Must be registered with Delhi Medical Council. Minimum of one year of experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JNU Part Time Pathologist Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.jnu.ac.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for JNU Part Time Pathologist Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.jnu.ac.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 07-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the JNU Part Time Pathologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the JNU Part Time Pathologist recruitment is 07 July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Part Time Pathologist post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a Post Graduation Degree (MD/DNB/Diploma or equivalent in the concerned stream), along with registration with the Delhi Medical Council.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of one year of experience is required for the Part Time Pathologist position at Jawaharlal Nehru University.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Part Time Pathologist role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Part Time Pathologist post is 55 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Part Time Pathologist position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 35,000 per month for the Part Time Pathologist role.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for this government job?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the official notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the JNU Part Time Pathologist recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Part Time Pathologist post?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves an Application Screening stage. Further details will be provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Part Time.
